title: Ladakh Budget Explorer
description: Experience the raw beauty of Ladakh on a budget. This package covers Leh town, Pangong Lake, and Nubra Valley with basic but comfortable guesthouses and shared transfers.
inclusions: Inner Line Permits for Nubra and Pangong

days.title: Arrival in Leh – Acclimatization Day
days.image: Leh town aerial view with Leh Palace on hilltop Ladakh
activities: Arrive at Kushok Bakula Rimpochhe Airport (3,524m); transfer to hotel
Complete rest for acclimatization – light walk around Leh Market in the evening
Visit Leh Palace (exterior) and Shanti Stupa at sunset (short walk only)

days.title: Leh Local Sightseeing
days.image: Leh Palace ancient ruins daytime Ladakh valley
activities: Morning: Visit Shanti Stupa for sunrise panorama over the Stok Kangri range
Afternoon: Explore Hemis Monastery (45 km, 1.5 hrs) – largest monastery in Ladakh
Evening: Stroll through Leh Main Bazaar and Hall of Fame Museum

days.title: Leh to Nubra Valley via Khardung La
days.image: Khardung La pass snow-covered highest motorable road sign Ladakh
activities: Early morning drive to Nubra Valley via Khardung La Pass (5,602m – world's highest motorable road)
Stop at Khardung La for photos (brief stop, max 20 min due to altitude)
Visit Diskit Monastery and giant Maitreya Buddha statue; camel ride on Hunder sand dunes (optional)

days.title: Nubra to Pangong Lake
days.image: Pangong Tso lake turquoise blue waters mountains Ladakh 3 Idiots
activities: Drive from Nubra to Pangong Lake via Shyok route (approx 5 hrs)
Arrive at Pangong Tso (4,350m) – the iconic blue lake; check in to lakeside camp
Evening walk along the lake shore; enjoy the surreal colour change of the lake at dusk

days.title: Pangong Lake to Leh
days.image: Pangong Lake sunrise golden hour reflection mountains
activities: Early morning sunrise at Pangong Lake – one of Ladakh's most photographed moments
Drive back to Leh via Chang La Pass (5,360m) – third highest motorable pass
Evening free for shopping in Leh Market (Pashmina, Thangka, turquoise jewellery)

days.title: Departure from Leh
days.image: Leh Airport morning mountains backdrop departure Ladakh
activities: Morning leisure; early check-out
Transfer to Kushok Bakula Airport for departure flight
End of Ladakh Budget Explorer

title: Ladakh Family Discovery
description: A family-friendly Ladakh tour designed with proper acclimatization, moderate activities, and comfortable stays. Perfect for families with children or elderly members.
inclusions: Camel safari at Hunder sand dunes

days.title: Arrival & Rest in Leh
days.image: Leh town panoramic view mountains backdrop Ladakh valley green
activities: Arrive Leh Airport; transfer to hotel (3-star)
Full day rest – complete acclimatization is essential for families
Light dinner; early bedtime recommended for altitude adjustment

days.title: Leh Monasteries & Shanti Stupa
days.image: Shanti Stupa white dome Leh panoramic valley view dusk
activities: Morning: Visit Shanti Stupa (short drive + 15-step climb) for panoramic valley views
Afternoon: Thiksey Monastery (resembles Potala Palace), Shey Palace
Evening: Explore Leh Main Bazaar for local handicrafts

days.title: Magnetic Hill & Sangam Point
days.image: Sangam confluence Zanskar Indus River Ladakh aerial view
activities: Morning: Visit Magnetic Hill (optical illusion road), Gurudwara Pathar Sahib
Sangam – confluence of Indus and Zanskar rivers (excellent photo opportunity)
Afternoon: Alchi Monastery (68 km from Leh) – 11th century murals; return by evening

days.title: Nubra Valley Excursion
days.image: Hunder sand dunes Nubra Valley Bactrian camels double-hump Ladakh
activities: Drive to Nubra via Khardung La Pass; brief stop at the summit for photos
Visit Diskit Monastery – 14th century Gelugpa monastery, giant Future Buddha statue
Camel ride on Hunder cold desert sand dunes – family favourite activity

days.title: Nubra to Pangong Lake
days.image: Pangong Lake Shayok Valley road panoramic turquoise water Ladakh
activities: Scenic drive from Nubra to Pangong Tso via Shyok Valley (approx 5 hours)
Arrive Pangong and settle into lakeside camp/guesthouse
Evening walk along the lake; bonfire at the camp (if available)

days.title: Pangong Sunrise & Return to Leh
days.image: Pangong Lake sunrise pink golden hour mountains reflection
activities: Wake up early for magical Pangong sunrise
Drive back to Leh; en route visit Rancho's School (3 Idiots filming location) at Druk Padma Karpo School
Evening free in Leh; dinner at local restaurant

days.title: Departure
days.image: Leh Airport gate morning departure mountains Ladakh last view
activities: Morning: Last shopping opportunity in Leh Market
Transfer to airport for departure
End of Ladakh Family Discovery

title: Ladakh Romantic Escape
description: A romantic journey through the moonscapes of Ladakh for honeymooners. Private transfers, lakeside glamping at Pangong, candlelit dinners under starlit skies.
inclusions: 6 nights accommodation (boutique hotels + lakeside glamping tent)

days.title: Arrival – Romantic Leh Welcome
days.image: Leh boutique hotel room view Himalayan peaks romantic Ladakh
activities: Arrive Leh; private transfer to boutique hotel
Rest day with light walk in Leh Garden in the evening
Welcome dinner at hotel with view of the Stok Kangri range

days.title: Leh Sightseeing
days.image: Leh Palace ancient stone walls romantic couple viewpoint Ladakh
activities: Morning: Shanti Stupa sunrise views – peaceful and romantic
Afternoon: Hemis Monastery and Thiksey Monastery
Evening: Leh Bazaar for couple shopping – Pashmina shawls, jewellery

days.title: Nubra Valley – Cold Desert Romance
days.image: Nubra Valley sand dunes camel ride couple sunset golden hour Ladakh
activities: Drive over Khardung La Pass (world's highest motorable road)
Private camel ride at Hunder sand dunes during golden hour
Stargazing dinner at Nubra camp – unmatched clear-sky experience

days.title: Nubra to Pangong
days.image: Pangong Tso lake shore tent camp couple evening blue water Ladakh
activities: Scenic drive to Pangong Tso via Shyok Valley
Settle into premium glamping tent directly on the lake shore
Sunset at Pangong Lake – mesmerising blue-to-violet colour shift

days.title: Pangong Lake Day
days.image: Pangong Lake dawn pink sky reflection couple Ladakh mountains
activities: Sunrise at Pangong Lake – private and surreal
Leisure morning: kayaking on the lake (if available)
Afternoon: explore nearby hillock for unobstructed lake views; evening bonfire dinner

days.title: Return to Leh – Leisure
days.image: Leh Market couple shopping Pashmina shawls evening Ladakh
activities: Morning drive back to Leh via Chang La Pass
Afternoon: couple spa at hotel
Farewell candlelit dinner at Leh's finest restaurant

days.title: Departure
days.image: Ladakh mountain road early morning mist romantic departure
activities: Morning leisure; late checkout if possible
Transfer to Leh Airport
End of Ladakh Romantic Escape

title: Ladakh Adventure Quest
description: Designed for thrill-seekers, this package includes Zanskar River rafting, high-altitude trekking, mountain biking, and overnight camping under Ladakh's star-filled skies.

days.title: Arrival & Acclimatization
days.image: Leh town morning mountains clear sky adventure base camp Ladakh
activities: Arrive Leh; transfer to hotel; full rest for acclimatization
Evening light walk in Leh; gear briefing with adventure guide
Early dinner and rest – crucial before high-altitude activities

days.title: Leh & Environs on Mountain Bike
days.image: Mountain biking Ladakh valley gravel trail Indus River backdrop
activities: Morning: mountain bike ride from Leh to Choglamsar village and back (25 km)
Afternoon: Hall of Fame Museum; Leh War Memorial
Evening: Briefing for Zanskar rafting tomorrow

days.title: Zanskar River Rafting & Nubra Drive
days.image: Zanskar River white water rafting Grade IV rapids Ladakh gorge
activities: Early morning: Zanskar River rafting from Chilling to Nimmu (Grade III-IV, 26 km, ~4 hrs)
Post-rafting drive to Nubra Valley via Khardung La
Evening: Camping at Nubra with bonfire

days.title: Nubra – Sand Dunes & Camel Ride
days.image: Hunder sand dunes Bactrian camels dusk adventure Ladakh trekker
activities: Morning: Sunrise trek on Nubra sand dunes (self-guided, 5 km loop)
Camel safari at Hunder during golden hour
Afternoon: Diskit Monastery visit; overnight camp in Nubra

days.title: Pangong Lake & Camping
days.image: Pangong Lake trekker camp high altitude blue water Ladakh adventure
activities: Drive from Nubra to Pangong via Shyok Valley
Arrive Pangong; acclimatize; evening hike to nearby ridge for aerial lake view
Overnight at lakeside camp under billions of stars

days.title: Pangong to Leh via Chang La
days.image: Chang La pass 17688 ft signboard snow ice adventure trekker Ladakh
activities: Sunrise at Pangong; pack camp
Drive back to Leh via Chang La (5,360m) – stop at the summit
Evening: Mountain biking in Leh environs (optional 2nd day biking)

days.title: Departure
days.image: Ladakh mountains farewell view from aircraft window clear sky
activities: Morning: Last visit to Leh Shanti Stupa for parting view
Transfer to airport
End of Ladakh Adventure Quest

title: Ladakh Luxury Himalayan Journey
description: Indulge in Ladakh's breathtaking landscapes from the comfort of luxury boutique camps and heritage hotels. Private helicopter option to Pangong, fine dining, and personalised experiences.
inclusions: 7 nights at luxury boutique hotels and premium glamping camps
Private monastery tour with English-speaking scholar guide
Couple spa at Leh Apricot hotel

days.title: Arrival – Luxury Welcome in Leh
days.image: Luxury boutique hotel Leh mountains view private balcony Ladakh
activities: Arrival at Leh; private luxury transfer to 5-star boutique hotel
Full acclimatization rest; oxygen supply available in room
Welcome dinner with traditional Ladakhi cuisine at hotel rooftop

days.title: Leh Heritage Tour
days.image: Thiksey Monastery sunrise golden hour Buddhist monks prayer Ladakh
activities: Sunrise at Shanti Stupa with hot Ladakhi butter tea served by guide
Private guided tour of Hemis Monastery (richest monastery in Ladakh)
Afternoon: Thiksey Monastery; evening Leh Palace interior tour

days.title: Alchi & Lamayuru
days.image: Lamayuru Moonland landscape 11th century monastery Ladakh dramatic
activities: Drive to Lamayuru (120 km, 3 hrs) – oldest monastery in Ladakh set in surreal moonland
Lunch at Alchi village; explore Alchi Monastery (11th-century murals)
Return to Leh by evening; sunset cocktails on hotel terrace

days.title: Helicopter to Pangong Lake
days.image: Helicopter landing Pangong Lake Ladakh premium aerial view mountains
activities: Luxury helicopter transfer from Leh to Pangong Lake (approx 30 min scenic flight)
Check in to premium lakeside camp with en-suite facilities
Private kayaking session on Pangong Tso

days.title: Pangong Leisure Day
days.image: Pangong Lake premium glamping tent interior luxury Ladakh sunrise
activities: Sunrise photography session on the lake shore with professional photographer
Morning yoga session by the lake
Afternoon: private guided hike to the hillock above the lake for aerial views; gourmet picnic lunch

days.title: Nubra Valley – Desert Luxury
days.image: Nubra Valley luxury camp desert sand dunes stars night Ladakh glamping
activities: Scenic road from Pangong to Nubra via Shyok Valley
Private camel ride on Hunder dunes at golden hour
Overnight at luxury tented camp with stargazing dinner

days.title: Nubra to Leh via Khardung La
days.image: Khardung La sign 18380ft luxury SUV parked snow Ladakh summit
activities: Drive over Khardung La Pass with champagne stop at the summit
Return to Leh; afternoon spa treatment at hotel
Farewell gourmet dinner with live Ladakhi folk music performance

days.title: Departure
days.image: Leh Airport morning Himalayan peaks clear blue sky luxury departure
activities: Leisurely breakfast; late checkout
Private transfer to Leh Airport
End of Ladakh Luxury Himalayan Journey

title: Ladakh Cultural Immersion
description: Explore the rich Tibetan Buddhist heritage of Ladakh through its ancient monasteries, colourful festivals, traditional villages, and vibrant local culture.

days.title: Arrival & Leh Culture Walk
days.image: Leh old town narrow lanes Buddhist prayer flags Ladakh culture
activities: Arrive Leh; rest and acclimatize
Evening walking tour of Leh's old town – prayer wheels, chortens, mani walls
Visit Leh Main Bazaar for local products – dried apricots, Pashmina, Thangka paintings

days.title: East Ladakh Monasteries
days.image: Hemis Monastery courtyard monks red robes festival Ladakh
activities: Morning: Hemis Monastery – largest and wealthiest in Ladakh; attend morning prayer ceremony if available
Afternoon: Thiksey Monastery (resembles Potala Palace Lhasa), Shey Palace
Evening: Stagna Monastery; local village interactions

days.title: West Ladakh – Alchi & Lamayuru
days.image: Alchi Monastery 11th century wooden carvings murals ancient Ladakh
activities: Drive west to Alchi Monastery (68 km) – unique for its 11th-century wooden architecture and murals
Lunch at local dhaba in Saspool village
Continue to Lamayuru Monastery (120 km) set in striking moonland landscape; check in to guesthouse

days.title: Nubra Valley & Diskit Monastery
days.image: Diskit Monastery Maitreya Buddha giant statue Nubra Valley Ladakh
activities: Drive Leh to Nubra via Khardung La Pass
Visit Diskit Monastery – 14th century Gelugpa monastery with giant Maitreya Buddha (32m)
Traditional cooking class in Nubra village home – momos, Skyu, butter tea

days.title: Sumur Village & Return to Leh
days.image: Sumur village Ladakh apricot trees stream traditional house mountains
activities: Morning: Visit Sumur Monastery (Samstanling Gompa) – serene and less touristy
Walk through Sumur village; apricot orchards (July-Aug) or frozen streams (winter)
Afternoon drive back to Leh via Khardung La; evening Leh Bazaar farewell walk

days.title: Departure
days.image: Ladakh prayer flags hilltop wind culture spiritual farewell morning
activities: Morning: Brief visit to Namgyal Tsemo Gompa (easy hilltop monastery above Leh Palace)
Transfer to Leh Airport
End of Ladakh Cultural Immersion

title: Ladakh Long Weekend Escape
description: A quick but memorable Ladakh getaway covering Leh town, key monasteries, and Magnetic Hill in just 4 days. Ideal for a long weekend trip.
exclusions: Inner Line Permits (for Pangong/Nubra – not covered)

days.title: Arrival & Acclimatization
days.image: Leh town evening lights mountains backdrop Ladakh first view
activities: Arrive Leh; transfer to guesthouse; MANDATORY rest
Evening short walk to Leh Market only (flat ground)
Early dinner and sleep – no exertion on Day 1

days.title: Leh City & East Monasteries
days.image: Thiksey Monastery morning light golden hour Ladakh valley backdrop
activities: Morning: Shanti Stupa sunrise panorama
Hemis and Thiksey Monastery visit (40-45 km round trip)
Evening: Leh Palace and Leh Bazaar stroll

days.title: West Leh Day Tour
days.image: Sangam Indus Zanskar River confluence Ladakh aerial turquoise green
activities: Magnetic Hill and Gurudwara Pathar Sahib (30 km)
Sangam point – Indus-Zanskar confluence (spectacular colour contrast)
Afternoon: Hall of Fame (Indian Army museum); local craft shopping in Leh

days.title: Morning Leisure & Departure
days.image: Ladakh morning Stok Kangri peak sunrise clear sky farewell
activities: Morning: Breakfast and last Leh Market visit
Transfer to Leh Airport for onward flight
End of Ladakh Long Weekend Escape
